$comment: Application manifest for the mautoma-agent npm/runtime side. This is NOT the Cursor plugin manifest — the Cursor manifest lives at .cursor-plugin/plugin.json. See CHANGELOG.md (v1.0.1) for the split.
name: mautoma-agent
description: Mautoma agent runtime — CapabilityRouter, AutoApply engine, and AI file cleaner. Distributed both as a Cursor plugin (see .cursor-plugin/plugin.json) and as a standalone npm package (see ./package.json).
author: huyhieu2k5

capabilityAxes.$comment: The 10 capability axes the AutoApply engine can route to. Not used by Cursor — kept here as the runtime contract.

scripts.sessionStartDriverUsage: Used by .cursor/hooks.json (sessionStart) — invoked by Cursor at session start.
